tooltip.divineworkshop.eternal_immortali: §6Mythic·Eternal Immortality %s§6："It witnessed Pangu create the heavens, and will see the stars fall—eternal and undying."
tooltip.divineworkshop.vanquish.line1: §6Mythic·Vanquish %s§6："One strike, mountains crumble, the cosmos shatter, all return to void."
tooltip.divineworkshop.iron_wall.line1: §6Mythic·Iron Wall %s§6："Against a thousand troops, a sea of blades and fire—I stand unmoved."
tooltip.divineworkshop.titan_gift.line1: §6Mythic·Titan's Gift %s§6："Bearing the weight of Kunlun, drawing the earth's vitality—everlasting."
tooltip.divineworkshop.titan_gift.line3: §6└─ §7Total level across all pieces §f%d§7，actual health adjusted to：§f%s%%
tooltip.divineworkshop.nirvana_breath.li: §6Mythic·Nirvana Breath %s§6："From the ashes, reborn—undying and immortal."
§6└─ §7Total level across all pieces §f%d§7，actual restore per tick：§f%s%%
tooltip.divineworkshop.backlash_thorn.li: §6Mythic·Backlash Thorn %s§6："What you inflict, tenfold returned; the striker shall burn."
tooltip.divineworkshop.blood_surge.line1: §6Mythic·Blood Surge %s§6："With my blood, I summon the raging tide—where it flows, all perishes."
tooltip.divineworkshop.blood_surge.line3: §6└─ §7Holder's current max health：§f%.1f§7 | Real-time damage bonus：§f+%s
tooltip.divineworkshop.undying_nirvana.l: §6Mythic·Undying Nirvana %s§6："From the abyss of death, the light of rebirth—endless cycle, life from death."
§6└─ §7Core formula：Damage absorption = Max Health × §f%s%%§7 × Total Level × (Consumed Layers + 1)
§6└─ §7Config：Layer recovery CD = §f%ss§7 ÷ Total Level§7 | Nirvana Buff duration：§f%ss
tooltip.divineworkshop.godly_blessing.li: §6Mythic·Godly Blessing %s§6："Gods look down, blessing all; where holy light falls, evil fades."
tooltip.divineworkshop.killer_field.line: §6Mythic·Killer Field %s§6："Killing intent pierces the sun; where the field reaches, all tremble, not a blade of grass grows."
§6└─ §7Range：§f%d§7 blocks | Interval：§f%d§7 ticks | Damage：§f%s%%§7 base attack
tooltip.divineworkshop.heavenly_sword_wi: §6Mythic·Heavenly Sword Will %s§6："One draw of the blade—heavens fall, earth overturns, all dharma void, reincarnation severed."
tooltip.divineworkshop.soul_reaver.line1: §6Mythic·Soul Reaver %s§6："Your vitality, my nourishment; your soul, my feast."
tooltip.divineworkshop.soul_reaver.line2: §6└─ §7Gain §f%s§7 max health and attack per kill, cap §f%s§7
tooltip.divineworkshop.sky_walker.line1: §6Mythic·Sky Walker %s§6："Wind is but a servant, clouds but stepping stones—the sky is your corridor."
tooltip.divineworkshop.amphibious_footwe: §2Normal·Amphibious Footwear %s§2："Walk on water, tread on ice—wherever you go, nature yields."
tooltip.divineworkshop.practice_makes_pe: §bRare·Practice Makes Perfect %s§b：Growth enchantment that permanently improves stats upon reaching usage thresholds.
tooltip.divineworkshop.sustenance.line1: §bRare·Sustenance %s§b："Nourish yourself with the essence of heaven and earth—no hunger."
tooltip.divineworkshop.blood_return.line: §dEpic·Blood Return %s§d："Drink the enemy's blood, return it to my essence."
tooltip.divineworkshop.swift_strikes.lin: §dEpic·Swift Strikes %s§d："Wind has not risen, yet a thousand blades have fallen."
tooltip.divineworkshop.last_stand.line1: §dEpic·Last Stand %s§d："In the direst straits, the keenest blade shows its edge."
tooltip.divineworkshop.lurking_strike.li: §dEpic·Lurking Strike %s§d："Lurking, for a more cruel bloom."
tooltip.divineworkshop.soothing_repair.l: §bRare·Soothing Repair %s§b："Nourish tools with time, as one nurtures life."
tooltip.divineworkshop.tracing_wind.line: §bRare·Tracing Wind %s§b："Step on shadows, ride the wind."
tooltip.divineworkshop.shift_hint: §7Hold Shift to expand Divine Workshop enchantment dynamic stats
message.divineworkshop.toggle_on: §6[Divine Workshop] §aEnchantment function on this item has been enabled！
message.divineworkshop.toggle_off: §6[Divine Workshop] §cEnchantment function on this item has been disabled！
message.divineworkshop.no_item: §c[Divine Workshop] Please hold an item with a toggleable enchantment！
message.divineworkshop.no_enchant: §c[Divine Workshop] This item has no toggleable enchantment！
message.divineworkshop.heavenly_sword_wi: §c[Heavenly Sword Will] No targets in range！
§a[Heavenly Sword Will] %d targets tremble under the sword!

§0Bonus scales with level and max health.
§6Undying Nirvana §0：On fatal damage, resurrect in place consuming one layer.
§0Layers restore over time; provides absorption and buffs.
§0Acquisition: Level 1 enchanted book can be obtained via crafting. Check the JEI recipe page for details.
jei.divineworkshop.godly_blessing.info.l: §6Godly Blessing §0：Grants beneficial effects to self and negative effects to nearby enemies.

§0Acquisition: Level 1 enchanted book can be obtained via crafting. Check the JEI recipe page for details.
